mapper.select: SELECT mst.user_id AS stmFirRegUserId ,mst.user_nm AS regNm FROM ad_user_mst mst ,(SELECT DISTINCT stm_fir_reg_user_id FROM um_upd_plan_mst )pmst WHERE mst.user_id = pmst.stm_fir_reg_user_id ORDER BY regNm asc

SELECT pmst.plan_id ,swmap.sw_id ,swmap.sw_file_id ,smst.sw_nm ,swmap.stb_sw_ver ,smst.sw_nm ,smst.upd_scop_cd --업데이트 범위 ,cd1.cd_nm as cdNm2 ,sfdtl.sw_file_dc_info ,( SELECT depFile.SW_ID FROM UM_SW_FILE_DTL depFile WHERE depFile.SW_FILE_ID = sfdtl.sw_file_dc_info ) as sw_dc_info ,( SELECT depFile.SW_FILE_VER FROM UM_SW_FILE_DTL depFile WHERE depFile.SW_FILE_ID = sfdtl.sw_file_dc_info ) as sw_file_dc_ver ,( SELECT depSw.SW_NM FROM UM_SW_MST depSw , UM_SW_FILE_DTL depFile WHERE depSw.SW_ID = depFile.SW_ID AND depFile.SW_FILE_ID = sfdtl.sw_file_dc_info ) as sw_file_nm ,sfdtl.sw_file_ver AS swVer ,sfdtl.stb_ui_ver AS uiVer ,'' as inteDtlVer , DECODE(smst.cust_dstrbnc_fct_yn,'Y','고객 방해 요소 있음','고객 방해 요소 없음') custDstrbncFctYn ,sfdtl.stm_fir_reg_date ,smst.sw_intro_msg ,sfdtl.sw_file_intro_msg ---------------------------------- ,sfdtl.sw_file_local_path sw_upload_path ,sfdtl.revision ,uusdvm.stb_sw_rst_ver FROM um_upd_plan_mst pmst ,um_upd_plan_sw_map swmap ,um_sw_mst smst ,um_sw_file_dtl sfdtl ,ad_comm_cd cd1 ,stb_model sm ,um_upd_sw_dvc_ver_map uusdvm ,um_auth_plan_map uapm WHERE 1=1
AND pmst.plan_id = uapm.auth_plan_id AND pmst.root_plan_id = uapm.root_plan_id AND uapm.ref_plan_id = swmap.plan_id
AND pmst.plan_id = swmap.plan_id
AND smst.sw_id = swmap.sw_id AND swmap.sw_file_id = sfdtl.sw_file_id AND cd1.comm_grp_cd = 'UPD_SCOP_CD' AND cd1.comm_cd = smst.upd_scop_cd AND pmst.plan_id = #{planId} AND pmst.modl_cd = sm.model_code(+) AND sm.model_name = uusdvm.modl_nm(+) AND swmap.stb_sw_ver = uusdvm.stb_sw_ver(+)

SELECT esch.plan_id ,esch.exe_sch_id ,esch.exe_sch_nm ,esch.exe_sch_expl ,esch.downld_mt_fg_cd ,esch.exe_sch_fr_dy ,esch.exe_sch_to_dy ,esch.cust_noty_mt_lst ,esch.push_delay_tm -------------------------------------------------- ,esch.push_limit_cnt ,REGEXP_REPLACE(esch.exe_sch_alrm_dd,',','|') AS exeSchAlrmDD ,esch.exe_sch_alrm_hh AS exeSchAlrmHH ,REGEXP_REPLACE(esch.exe_sch_alrm_mi,',','|') AS exeSchAlrmMI ,'' AS selTgt ,NVL(esch.to_goal_qty,0) AS toGoalQty -- 종료 목표 수량 ,NVL(esch.tgt_qty,0) AS tgtQty --계획수량 ,NVL(esch.conf_qty,0) AS confQty --실제수량 ,NVL(esch.end_cond_rt,0) AS endCondRt --종료조건 ,NVL(esch.wat_qty,0) AS notPrgQty --미진행 수량 ,NVL(esch.prg_qty,0) AS prgQty --진행 수량 ,NVL(esch.err_qty,0) AS errQty --오류 수량 ,NVL(esch.to_qty,0) AS endQty --완료 수량 ,esch.scr_disp_fg_cd ,esch.slp_wat_tm ,esch.cust_noty_msg ,esch.cust_noty_mt_lst ,esch.scr_disp_tm ,esch.upd_sts_fg_cd ,NVL(esch.stop_yn,'N') AS stopYn ,cd1.cd_nm as updStsFgNm ,(SELECT user_nm FROM ad_user_mst WHERE user_id = esch.STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID) STM_FIR_REG_USER_NM ,TO_CHAR(esch.STM_FIR_REG_DATE,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') STM_FIR_REG_DATE ,(SELECT user_nm FROM ad_user_mst WHERE user_id = esch.STM_LAST_UPD_USER_ID) STM_LAST_UPD_USER_NM ,TO_CHAR(esch.stm_last_upd_date,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') stm_last_upd_date ,CASE WHEN esch.upd_sts_fg_cd = '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END enableUpdate ,CASE WHEN esch.to_goal_qty > 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END totTgtYn FROM um_upd_plan_exe_sch_lst esch ,ad_comm_cd cd1 WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND cd1.comm_grp_cd = 'UPD_STS_FG_CD' AND cd1.comm_cd = esch.upd_sts_fg_cd

SELECT map.dvc_grp_id ,gmst.dvc_grp_nm FROM um_upd_plan_dvc_grp_map map ,um_upd_plan_mst pmst ,dm_dvc_grp_mst gmst WHERE pmst.plan_id = #{planId} AND pmst.plan_id = map.plan_id AND map.dvc_grp_id = gmst.dvc_grp_id AND map.ecpt_tgt_yn = #{ecptTgtYn}

SELECT pmst.plan_id ,pmst.root_plan_id ,pmst.par_plan_id ----------------------- ,uapm.ref_plan_id -- 인증계획서 매핑 추가 ,usm.upd_scop_cd ,parMst.plan_nm AS parPlanNm ,pmst.stb_sw_plan_last_ver ,(SELECT MAX(uupsm.stb_sw_ver) AS stb_sw_ver FROM um_upd_plan_sw_map uupsm WHERE plan_id = pmst.par_plan_id) AS parStbUiVer ,firtMst.plan_nm AS firstPlanNm ,'' as parInteVer ,pmst.plan_nm ,pmst.plan_expl ,pmst.stb_cmcl_fg_cd ,pmst.plan_apl_fg_cd ,cd.cd_nm as planAplFgNm ,pmst.modl_cd ,NVL(pmst.tot_tgt_yn,'N') AS totTgtYn ,NVL(pmst.tgt_qty,0) AS tgtQty ,pmst.plan_exe_fg_cd ,pmst.upd_sts_fg_cd ,(select user_nm from ad_user_mst where user_id = pmst.stm_fir_reg_user_id) as regNm ,to_char(pmst.stm_fir_reg_date,'yyyy.mm.dd hh24:mi') stm_fir_reg_date ,(select user_nm from ad_user_mst where user_id = pmst.stm_last_upd_user_id) as updNm ,to_char(pmst.stm_last_upd_date,'yyyy.mm.dd hh24:mi') stm_last_upd_date ,pmst.plan_fg_cd ,pmst.upd_polling_tm ,(SELECT max(REQ_SVC) FROM UM_UPD_PLAN_STBL_VER_MAP WHERE STBL_PLAN_ID =#{planId} GROUP BY STBL_PLAN_ID) AS reqSvc ,pmst.scrbr_typ_cd FROM um_upd_plan_mst pmst ,um_upd_plan_mst firtMst ,um_upd_plan_mst parMst ,um_upd_plan_sw_map uupsm ,um_sw_mst usm ,ad_comm_cd cd ,um_auth_plan_map uapm -- 인증계획서 매핑 추가 WHERE pmst.plan_id = #{planId} AND pmst.root_plan_id = firtMst.plan_id(+) AND pmst.par_plan_id = parMst.plan_id(+) AND pmst.plan_id = uupsm.plan_id(+) AND pmst.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER = uupsm.STB_SW_VER(+) AND uupsm.sw_id = usm.sw_id(+) AND cd.comm_grp_cd = 'PLAN_APL_FG_CD' AND cd.comm_cd = pmst.plan_apl_fg_cd AND pmst.plan_id = uapm.auth_plan_id(+) -- 인증계획서 매핑 추가 AND pmst.root_plan_id = uapm.root_plan_id(+) -- 인증계획서 매핑 추가

SELECT mgm.cug_id FROM mn_cug_mst mgm ,dm_cug_mst dcm ,um_upd_plan_mst pmst ,um_upd_plan_cug_map pmap WHERE 1=1 AND mgm.cug_id = dcm.cug_id AND mgm.cug_id = pmap.cug_id AND mgm.use_yn = 'Y' AND pmst.plan_id = pmap.plan_id AND pmst.plan_id = #{planId}

SELECT distinct qmap.team_cd as value FROM um_upd_plan_qlty_team_map qmap ,um_upd_plan_mst pmst ,dm_qlty_team_mst tmst WHERE pmst.plan_id = #{planId} AND qmap.plan_id = pmst.plan_id AND qmap.team_cd = tmst.team_cd

SELECT a.sw_id, b.sw_file_id, a.sw_nm, b.sw_file_nm, a.upd_scop_cd, cd.cd_nm as updScopNm, b.sw_file_ver, b.stb_ui_ver, b.stm_fir_reg_date, b.sw_file_dc_info, DECODE(a.cust_dstrbnc_fct_yn,'Y','고객 방해 요소 있음','고객 방해 요소 없음') custDstrbncFctYn, c.stb_sw_ver, a.sw_intro_msg, b.sw_file_intro_msg FROM um_sw_mst a, um_sw_file_dtl b, ( SELECT A.sw_file_id, A.stb_sw_ver, A.root_plan_id, B.lvl FROM (SELECT sw_file_id, stb_sw_ver, root_plan_id, plan_id FROM ( SELECT uupsm.sw_file_id AS sw_file_id, uupsm.stb_sw_ver AS stb_sw_ver, uupsm.root_plan_id AS root_plan_id, uupsm.plan_id as plan_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY uupsm.sw_id ORDER BY uupsm.stb_sw_ver DESC ) AS row_idx FROM um_upd_plan_sw_map uupsm WHERE 1=1 AND root_plan_id = #{rootPlanId} ) WHERE row_idx = 1 ) A ,(SELECT level as lvl , plan_id , plan_nm , par_plan_id , root_plan_id FROM UM_UPD_PLAN_MST START WITH root_plan_id = #{rootPlanId} AND par_plan_id is null CONNECT BY par_plan_id = prior plan_id)B WHERE A.PLAN_ID = B.PLAN_ID AND B.lvl
<
<=
(SELECT lvl FROM (select level as lvl , plan_id , plan_nm , par_plan_id , root_plan_id from UM_UPD_PLAN_MST start with root_plan_id = #{rootPlanId} AND par_plan_id is null connect by par_plan_id = prior plan_id)C WHERE C.plan_id = #{planId}) ) c ,ad_comm_cd cd WHERE a.sw_id = b.sw_id AND B.sw_file_id = c.sw_file_id AND cd.comm_grp_cd = 'UPD_SCOP_CD' AND a.upd_scop_cd = cd.comm_cd ORDER BY c.stb_sw_ver

SELECT sw.SW_NM , sw.SW_INTRO_MSG , swFile.SW_FILE_VER , swFile.SW_FILE_INTRO_MSG FROM UM_SW_MST sw , UM_SW_FILE_DTL swFile WHERE 1=1
AND swFile.SW_FILE_ID IN
UPPER(#{file_id})
AND sw.SW_ID = swFile.SW_ID
SELECT mst.cug_id ,mst.cug_expl as cugNm FROM dm_cug_mst mst ,dm_cug_dvc_modl_map map WHERE map.modl_cd = #{modlCd} AND mst.cug_id = map.cug_id AND map.use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT count(*) AS total FROM UM_UPD_PLAN_CUG_MAP uupcm , UM_UPD_PLAN_MST uupm WHERE UUPM.MODL_CD = #{modlCd} AND UUPM.PLAN_ID = UUPCM.PLAN_ID AND UUPCM.CUG_ID IN (${cugListString})

SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(4) */ DDM.STB_ID ,DECODE(LENGTH(STB.USER_SERVICE_NUM),10,'상용','테스트용' ) STBDIVISION ,PS.MAC_ADDRESS ,(SELECT SM.MODEL_NAME FROM STB_MODEL SM WHERE SM.MODEL_CODE = PS.MODEL_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1) MODEL_NAME ,(SELECT MCM.CUG_NM FROM DM_CUG_MST DCM ,MN_CUG_MST MCM WHERE STB.SERVICE_CODE = DCM.CUG_ID AND DCM.CUG_ID = MCM.CUG_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) CUG_EXPL ,(SELECT COMM.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD COMM WHERE COMM.COMM_GRP_CD = 'IPTV_STATUS_CODE' AND COMM.COMM_CD = STB.IPTV_STATUS_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1) CD_NM ,DDPM.CLNT_IPADDR ,DDM.STB_SW_VER STB_SW_PLAN_INST_VER ,DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER ,TO_CHAR(DDPM.STM_UPTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') STM_UPTM ,DECODE(DDPM.STM_UPTM,NULL,'',TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC(DDPM.STM_UPTM)||'일') AS OVERUPTIME ,'N' AS MYSTBYN ,(SELECT DQTM.TEAM_NM FROM DM_QLTY_TEAM_MST DQTM WHERE DDM.TEAM_CD = DQTM.TEAM_CD AND ROWNUM =1) AREAQLTY ,STB.USER_SERVICE_NUM ,DECODE(DDPM.HDMI_POW,'1','사용함','0','사용 안함',NULL) HDMI_POW ,DECODE(DDPM.RCU_PAIRING,'true','Y','false','N',NULL) RCU_PAIRING ,DDM.TEAM_CD FROM DM_DVC_MST DDM ,STB STB ,PHYSICAL_STB PS ,DM_DVC_PRVN_MST DDPM WHERE 1=1 AND DDM.STB_ID = STB.STB_ID AND DDM.STB_ID = PS.STB_ID (+) AND DDM.STB_ID = DDPM.STB_ID (+)
AND ${searchType} IN
#{type}
AND DDM.stb_id not in ( SELECT stb_id FROM um_upd_plan_stb_map WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND ecpt_tgt_yn = #{ecptTgtYn})
AND DDM.stb_id in ( SELECT stb_id FROM um_upd_plan_stb_map WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND ecpt_tgt_yn = #{ecptTgtYn})
ORDER BY DDM.STB_ID

SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(4) */ COUNT(*) FROM DM_DVC_MST DDM ,STB STB ,PHYSICAL_STB PS ,DM_DVC_PRVN_MST DDPM WHERE 1=1 AND DDM.STB_ID = STB.STB_ID AND DDM.STB_ID = PS.STB_ID (+) AND DDM.STB_ID = DDPM.STB_ID (+)
AND ${searchType} IN
#{type}
AND DDM.stb_id not in ( SELECT stb_id FROM um_upd_plan_stb_map WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND ecpt_tgt_yn = #{ecptTgtYn})
AND DDM.stb_id in ( SELECT stb_id FROM um_upd_plan_stb_map WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND ecpt_tgt_yn = #{ecptTgtYn})

SELECT substr(max(uupsm.stb_sw_ver),0,9) as stbSwVer FROM um_upd_plan_sw_map uupsm ,um_sw_file_dtl usfd WHERE uupsm.root_plan_id = #{planId} AND uupsm.sw_id = usfd.sw_id AND uupsm.sw_file_id = usfd.sw_file_id AND uupsm.upd_scop_cd = '1'
SELECT count(*) FROM UM_UPD_PLAN_MST uupm, UM_UPD_PLAN_SW_MAP uupsm WHERE uupm.PLAN_ID = #{parPlanId} AND uupm.PLAN_ID = uupsm.PLAN_ID AND uupm.UPD_STS_FG_CD = '4' AND uupsm.UPD_SCOP_CD = '1'
SELECT 'STB_ID' stb_id, 'PLAN_ID' plan_id, 'EXE_SCH_ID' exe_sch_id FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT stb_id, plan_id, exe_sch_id FROM UM_UPD_DVC_HST WHERE plan_id=#{planId} AND exe_sch_id=#{exeSchId}
